Good service from the staff, local products and a quiet place, full summer hours until 11pm

reviews.comment:
En la full me atendió un flaco super soberbio, fuimos con la mejor a comprar hamburguesas ya que estábamos de paso y nos respondió de mala gana. Re desubicado, como si nos hicieran un favor el personal. Nosotros vamos a pagar por un servicio y no a pedir regalado. Nos fuimos al Spot de Axion y fue un cambio de 180°  nos atendieron con toda la amabilidad. La opinión es para el servicio de Full, no con los playeros.

(Translated by Google)
At the Full station, I was served by a super arrogant guy. We went there with the best friend to buy hamburgers since we were passing by, and he answered us rudely. He was really out of line, acting like the staff were doing us a favor. We pay for a service, not expect it to be free. We went to the Axion Spot, and it was a complete change; they served us with the utmost kindness. This review is for the Full station's service, not the attendants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfdjlPNExnEAE

reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio del cajero de turno mañana de la full, fuimos a comprar hamburguesa contesto de la mala forma y encima q no hacían hasta el medio día.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the cashier on duty in the morning at the Full store. We went to buy a hamburger and he answered rudely and said they wouldn't be making them until noon.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfdjlQa2pRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lo más importante. Baños Limpios. Hay papel higiénico, jabón y funciona el seca-manos. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️.

Lo demás como todas las estaciones de servicio.
Atención buena.🙂

De maravillas el lugar para estacionar y recreación para los pibes, los largas en el parque que se diviertan mientras te tomas unos buenos verdes con tu pareja. 🙌🏕

Verde muy verde todo. Muy lindo. Sombría, árboles, pastito... si pedís más te vas a un Sheraton. 🌳🌻🏕

(Translated by Google)
The most important thing. Clean bathrooms. There's toilet paper, soap, and the hand dryer works. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️.

The rest is like all gas stations.
Good service. 🙂

The parking and recreation areas for the kids are wonderful. Let them hang out in the park and have fun while you sip some good greens with your partner. 🙌🏕

Very green everything. Very pretty. Shade, trees, grass... if you ask for more, you'll go to a Sheraton. 🌳🌻🏕
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfX1pua0dnEAE

reviews.comment:
lugar recomendado para hacer parada. moderno el full con todas las comodidades y buen servicio. nafta, cafe, hamburguesa y a seguir camino!

(Translated by Google)
A recommended place to stop. Modern, fully equipped with all the amenities and good service. Gas, coffee, a burger, and onward you go!

reviews.comment:
Para destacar la calidez de su gente,!! El 15 de enero tuve un percance con un neumatico del auto, y me dieron el mejor.soporte...hasta llevarme a una gomeria para solucionar el problema!! Muy agradecido al señor que entiendo era el supervisor...con el apuro no le pregunte su nombre!!

(Translated by Google)
I want to highlight the warmth of their people! On January 15th, I had a problem with a car tire, and they gave me the best support...even taking me to a tire shop to fix it! I'm very grateful to the gentleman who I believe was the supervisor...in my haste, I didn't ask his name!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfMXFIQ0xBEAE
